user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new resource requisition approver, so that resource requests are routed to the correct approver
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Resource Requisition Approvers screen; When I click Add new resource requisition approver and set the template, employee class and approver(s); Then the rule is created and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to define approvers for non-budgeted positions, so that unbudgeted requisitions get the required additional approval
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding or editing a resource requisition approver; When I set the Approver(s) for non-budgeted positions; Then it is saved against that rule

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter rules by employee class, location, department and position, so that I can find the relevant approver configuration
acceptance_criteria: Given approver rules exist; When I select filters and click Search; Then only matching rules are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to reset the filters, so that I can start a new search from a clean state
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters; When I click Reset; Then the filters clear and the full list is shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view and edit an approver rule, so that I can review and update template names, approvers and applicability
acceptance_criteria: Given a rule is listed; When I click View or Edit; Then I can review or modify its Template name, Approver(s) and Applicability
